criteria_verification.criterion_text: `reconcile_on_boot` runs exactly once at startup before normal message flow resumes
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented `async def reconcile_on_boot(deps: ReconcileDeps) -> ReconcileReport` in src/forge/adapters/nats/pipeline_consumer.py. The function is the dedicated boot entry point: it drains every redelivered build-queued message via `deps.fetch_redeliveries`, then runs the SQLite paused scan, and returns a ReconcileReport. Caller invokes it once before the normal fetch loop is started; tests TestReconcileLifecycle.test_returns_report_with_no_redeliveries_and_no_paused and test_drains_until_fetch_returns_empty verify the lifecycle.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented `async def reconcile_on_boot(deps: ReconcileDeps) -> ReconcileReport` in src/forge/adapters/nats/pipeline_consumer.py. The function is the dedicated boot entry point: it drains every redelivered build-queued message via `deps.fetch_redeliveries`, then runs the SQLite paused scan, and returns a ReconcileReport. Caller invokes it once before the normal fetch loop is started; tests TestReconcileLifecycle.test_returns_report_with_no_redeliveries_and_no_paused and test_drains_until_fetch_returns_empty verify the lifecycle.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Terminal-state redelivery → ack called, no new build started (idempotency)
criteria_verification.evidence: Branch 1 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: when `deps.read_build_state` returns a value in TERMINAL_BUILD_STATES (COMPLETE / FAILED / CANCELLED / SKIPPED), the function awaits `msg.ack()`, increments `report.acked_terminal`, and returns without dispatching a new build or calling `mark_interrupted_and_reset`. TestReconcileTerminalStates is parametrised over all four terminal states and asserts ack-once + dispatch-not-called.
criteria_verification.notes: Branch 1 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: when `deps.read_build_state` returns a value in TERMINAL_BUILD_STATES (COMPLETE / FAILED / CANCELLED / SKIPPED), the function awaits `msg.ack()`, increments `report.acked_terminal`, and returns without dispatching a new build or calling `mark_interrupted_and_reset`. TestReconcileTerminalStates is parametrised over all four terminal states and asserts ack-once + dispatch-not-called.

criteria_verification.evidence: Branch 2 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: when state is in RESTART_FROM_PREPARING_STATES (RUNNING, FINALISING, PREPARING), the function awaits `deps.mark_interrupted_and_reset(feature_id, correlation_id)` (an atomic INTERRUPTED→PREPARING write) and then redispatches the build via `deps.consumer_deps.dispatch_build` with a deferred ack callback. TestReconcileInFlightStates is parametrised over IN_FLIGHT_BUILD_STATES + a separate test for PREPARING; both assert mark_interrupted_and_reset.assert_awaited_once_with and dispatch_build.assert_awaited_once.
criteria_verification.notes: Branch 2 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: when state is in RESTART_FROM_PREPARING_STATES (RUNNING, FINALISING, PREPARING), the function awaits `deps.mark_interrupted_and_reset(feature_id, correlation_id)` (an atomic INTERRUPTED→PREPARING write) and then redispatches the build via `deps.consumer_deps.dispatch_build` with a deferred ack callback. TestReconcileInFlightStates is parametrised over IN_FLIGHT_BUILD_STATES + a separate test for PREPARING; both assert mark_interrupted_and_reset.assert_awaited_once_with and dispatch_build.assert_awaited_once.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Paused builds re-emit `BuildPausedPayload` with the ORIGINAL `correlation_id` (Group D @edge-case)
criteria_verification.evidence: Branch 3 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: looks up the original PausedBuildSnapshot from `paused_by_key`, then awaits `deps.publish_build_paused(snap.build_paused_payload)`. Because the snapshot stores the original BuildPausedPayload, the correlation_id field is preserved verbatim. Verified by TestReconcilePausedRedelivery.test_paused_redelivery_reemits_build_paused_with_original_correlation_id which asserts sent_payload.correlation_id == 'corr-001'.
criteria_verification.notes: Branch 3 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: looks up the original PausedBuildSnapshot from `paused_by_key`, then awaits `deps.publish_build_paused(snap.build_paused_payload)`. Because the snapshot stores the original BuildPausedPayload, the correlation_id field is preserved verbatim. Verified by TestReconcilePausedRedelivery.test_paused_redelivery_reemits_build_paused_with_original_correlation_id which asserts sent_payload.correlation_id == 'corr-001'.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Paused builds re-emit `ApprovalRequestPayload` — "first response wins" semantics from ADR-ARCH-021 honoured
criteria_verification.evidence: Same Branch 3 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: after publishing BuildPaused, awaits `deps.publish_approval_request(snap.approval_request_payload, snap.approval_subject)`. The ApprovalRequestPayload.request_id is preserved from the original (e.g. req-corr-001) — ADR-ARCH-021 first-response-wins is honoured because duplicate requests with the same request_id are treated as the same logical request. Verified by TestReconcilePausedRedelivery.test_paused_redelivery_reemits_approval_request_on_original_subject (asserts request_id and approval_subject are preserved).
criteria_verification.notes: Same Branch 3 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: after publishing BuildPaused, awaits `deps.publish_approval_request(snap.approval_request_payload, snap.approval_subject)`. The ApprovalRequestPayload.request_id is preserved from the original (e.g. req-corr-001) — ADR-ARCH-021 first-response-wins is honoured because duplicate requests with the same request_id are treated as the same logical request. Verified by TestReconcilePausedRedelivery.test_paused_redelivery_reemits_approval_request_on_original_subject (asserts request_id and approval_subject are preserved).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unknown `(feature_id, correlation_id)` → fresh build (no duplicate detection fires)
criteria_verification.evidence: Branch 4 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: when `read_build_state` returns None, the function increments `report.fresh_builds` and delegates to the standard `handle_message(msg, deps.consumer_deps)` path. No reconcile-side ack-and-skip fires; the build flows through the normal validation path which only acks if the payload is malformed or the build is genuinely complete. Verified by TestReconcileUnknownBuild.test_unknown_redelivery_is_dispatched_as_fresh.
criteria_verification.notes: Branch 4 of `_reconcile_one_redelivery`: when `read_build_state` returns None, the function increments `report.fresh_builds` and delegates to the standard `handle_message(msg, deps.consumer_deps)` path. No reconcile-side ack-and-skip fires; the build flows through the normal validation path which only acks if the payload is malformed or the build is genuinely complete. Verified by TestReconcileUnknownBuild.test_unknown_redelivery_is_dispatched_as_fresh.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Scenario test: "A redelivered build-queued message for a completed build is acknowledged idempotently" passes (Group E @data-integrity)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestReconcileTerminalStates.test_terminal_state_is_acked_and_no_build_dispatched is parametrised over TERMINAL_BUILD_STATES = {COMPLETE, FAILED, CANCELLED, SKIPPED}. The COMPLETE case is the literal Group E scenario: redelivered build-queued for a COMPLETE build → msg.ack awaited exactly once, dispatch_build never called, mark_interrupted_and_reset never called, publish_build_paused never called. report.acked_terminal == 1.
criteria_verification.notes: TestReconcileTerminalStates.test_terminal_state_is_acked_and_no_build_dispatched is parametrised over TERMINAL_BUILD_STATES = {COMPLETE, FAILED, CANCELLED, SKIPPED}. The COMPLETE case is the literal Group E scenario: redelivered build-queued for a COMPLETE build → msg.ack awaited exactly once, dispatch_build never called, mark_interrupted_and_reset never called, publish_build_paused never called. report.acked_terminal == 1.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all four rule branches with mocked SQLite reader
criteria_verification.evidence: Mocked SQLite reader is the `read_build_state` AsyncMock built in `reconcile_factory`; it returns values from a per-test `state_by_key` dict. Each branch has dedicated tests: TestReconcileTerminalStates (branch 1, parametrised x4), TestReconcileInFlightStates (branch 2, parametrised x2 + a separate PREPARING test), TestReconcilePausedRedelivery (branch 3, two tests for build-paused and approval-request) and TestReconcileUnknownBuild (branch 4). TestReconcilePausedScan adds the SQLite belt-and-braces scan, and TestReconcileAllBranches.test_one_call_handles_terminal_running_paused_and_unknown exercises all four rule branches in a single reconcile_on_boot call.
criteria_verification.notes: Mocked SQLite reader is the `read_build_state` AsyncMock built in `reconcile_factory`; it returns values from a per-test `state_by_key` dict. Each branch has dedicated tests: TestReconcileTerminalStates (branch 1, parametrised x4), TestReconcileInFlightStates (branch 2, parametrised x2 + a separate PREPARING test), TestReconcilePausedRedelivery (branch 3, two tests for build-paused and approval-request) and TestReconcileUnknownBuild (branch 4). TestReconcilePausedScan adds the SQLite belt-and-braces scan, and TestReconcileAllBranches.test_one_call_handles_terminal_running_paused_and_unknown exercises all four rule branches in a single reconcile_on_boot call.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent verification confirmed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 335 chars provided.
